title: mpbse nic in MP Board Result LIVE: List of toppers released, official website still down; steps to check scores here
description: mpbse nic in MP Board Result 2026 LIVE: The results of the Madhya Pradesh Board of Secondary Education (MPBSE) High School and Higher Secondary exams have been declared by CM Mohan Yadav at 11 am. The results have been declared at mpbse.mponline.gov.in and the list of toppers has also been released.
